_description: Neon Postgres CLI (neonctl) + PostgreSQL server + NEON_API_KEY
_bootstrap: if ! command -v neonctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm install -g neonctl@latest; fi

if ! dpkg -s postgresql >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Installing postgresql server...'; sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get update -qq && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y -qq postgresql; fi
